headline: Is It Time To Reassess Lululemon (LULU) After Recent Share Price Pressure?
summary: Wondering whether lululemon athletica at around US$145.85 still reflects its long term potential, or if the market has moved on? This article breaks down what that price might really mean for you. The stock has been under pressure, with returns of 10.4% over 7 days, 20.1% over 30 days, 30.8% year to date, 50.2% over 1 year, 60.0% over 3 years and 51.6% over 5 years. This can signal a shift in how investors are thinking about both growth potential and risk. Recent coverage around the brand...
